{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Lemon's crew
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Every member of [[Lemon's crew]] is a Nova-Bot.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30">''The Pilot'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
